title: Proclamation No. 727, s. 1991
text:
MALACAÑANG MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 727

AMENDING PROCLAMATION NO. 204, DATED DECEMBER 28, 1928, AS AMENDED, WHICH ESTABLISHED THE MAKAR TOWNSITE RESERVATION SITUATED IN BARANGAY OF MAKAR, MUNICIPALITY OF BUAYAN, PROVINCE OF COTABATO, ISLAND OF MINDANAO, BY EXCLUDING THE UNTITLED LAND EMBRACED THEREIN AND DECLARING THE SAME OPEN FOR DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO THE PROVISIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 730.

Upon recommendation of the Secretary of Environment and Natural Resources and by virtue of the powers vested in me by law, I, CORAZON C. AQUINO, President of the Philippines, do hereby further amend Proclamation No. 204, dated December 28, 1928, as amended by Proclamation No. 149, dated April 16, 1955, which established certain parcel of land situated in the Municipality of Buayan, Province of Cotabato, Island of Mindanao, as Makar Townsite Reservation, by excluding therefrom the untitled lots and declaring the same open for disposition under the provisions of Republic Act No. 730, the technical descriptions of which are as follows:

Plan Swo-11-000539

A PARCEL OF LAND (Swo-11-000539) being an untitled portion of Lot 1, Makar Townsite, Ts-50, situated in the Barangay of Makar, City of General Santos, Island of Mindanao. Bounded as follows: Along lines 132-133-134 by Lot 1, Psu-141675 claimed by Saayvedra Saway; along lines 134-135-136-137 by claim of Heirs of Pedro Acharon; along lines 137-138 by Psd-11- 005201; along lines 138-139-140-141-142- 143-144-1 by Psu-138293, Amd. 2 claimed by Onos Piang; along line 1-2 by Psd-11- 005201; along line 2-3 by Sarangani Bay; along lines 3-4-5 by Lot 2, Psu-138181; along line 5-6 by the lot itself; along lines 6-7-8-9 by Lot 1, Psu-109645; along lines 9-10-11-12 by Lot 2, Psu-109645; along lines 12-13-14 by Lot 1, Psu-109645; along line 14-15 by the lot itself; along line 15-16 by Lot 4, Psu-138181; along lines 16-17-18 by Lot 1, Psu-206598; along lines 18-19-20 by Lot 2, Psu-206598; along lines 20-21-22-23-24 by Lot 4, Psu-138181; along line 24-25 by F-11-03-014511-D; along lines 25-26-27-28-29 by Pr-123, Labangal Elementary School; along lines 29-30-31-32-34-35-36-37 by F-11-03-014511-D; along line 37-38 by Lot 4, Psu-138181; along line 38-39 by Lot 3, Psu-138181; on the SW., along line 39-40 by Psu-133568; along line 40-41 by Olarte Hermanos, Sc-6834 (now) Salud Espina; along lines 41-42-43-44 by Lot 2-A, Psu-133568, Amd 3; along line 44-45 by the lot itself; along lines 45-46-47 by Lot 2-G- 5-P-10-B, Psu-141674; along lines 47-48- 49-50-51 by Lot 2-G-2. Psu-141674, Amd. 2; along lines 51-52-53-54 by Lot 2-G-5-P-10-B, Psu-141674; along line 54-55 by the lot itself; along lines 55-56-57-58-59-60 by Lot 2-A, Psu-133568, Amd. 3; along line 60-61 by Olarte Hermanos, Sc-6834 (now) Salud Espina; along line 61-62 by Lot 1-C, Psu-133568, Amd. 4; along line 62-63 by Olarte Hermanos, Sc-6834 (now) Salud Espina; along line 63-64 by Lot 1-D-1, Psu-133568, Amd. 6; along line 64-65 by Lot 1-D-2, Psu-133568, Amd. 6; along line 65-66 by Lot 1-D-3, Psu-133568; along line 66-67 by Lot 1-D-4, Psu-133568; Amd. 6; along line 67-68 by Lot 1-B, Psu-133568; Amd. 4; along lines 68-69-70-71 by Lot 2-E., Psu-133568; Amd. 3; along lines 71-72-73-74-75- 76 by Lot 2, Psu-132569, Amd. 9; along lines 76-77-78-79-80-81 by Lot 2-E, Psu-133568, Amd. 3; along line 81-82 by Lot 1-A, Psu-133568, Amd. 4; along line 82-83 by Lot 1-D-4, Psu-133568, Amd. 6; along lines 83-84-85 by Lot 1-D-3, Psu-133568; along line 85-86 by Olarte Hermanos, Sc-6834 (now) Salud Espina; along lines 86-87-88 by Lot 2-6-5-D-10-Q, Psu-141674, Amd. 5; along line 88-89 by the lot itself; along line 89-90 by Lot 2-B; along lines 90-91-92 by Lot 2-E; along line 92-93 by Lot 2-F; along line 93-94 by Lot 2-G; along line 94-95 by Lot 2-H; along line 95-96 by Lot 2-1; along line 96-97 by Lot 2-J, all of Psu-141674; Amd. 8; along line 97-98 by the lot itself; along line 98-99 by Lot 2-A, Psu-141674, Amd. 6; along line 99-100 by Lot 2-B; along line 100-101 by Lot 2-D, all of Psu-141674; along line 101-102 by the lot itself; along lines 102-103-104-105-106 by Lot 2-G-5-D-10-S-9-1, Psu-141674, Amd. 6; along line 106-107 by the lot itself; along line 107-108 by Lot-2-D, Psu-141674, Amd. 6; along lines 108-109-110 by Lot 2-C, Psu-141674, Amd. 6; along line 110-111 by Lot 2-B; along lines 111-112-113 by Lot 2-A, Psu-141674, Amd. 6; along line 113-114 by the lot itself; along line 114-115 by Lot 2-J, along lines 115-116-117 by Lot 2-D; along line 117-118 by Lot 2-C; along line 118-119 by Lot 2-B, all of Psu-141674, Amd. 8; along line 119-120 by the lot; along lines 120-121-122-123 by Lot 2-A, Psu-141674, Amd.; along line 123-124 by Lot 2-B, Psu-141674; along line 124-125 by Lot 2-0, Psu-141674; along line 125-126 by lot itself; along lines 126-127-128-129-130 by Lot 2-E., Psu-141674, Amd.; along line 130-131 by the lot itself; along line 131-132 by Lot 2-0, Psu-141674. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan being N. 45 deg. 54’E., 1,160.29 m. from BLLM No. 1, Bo. of Makar, Thence. . . .

Containing an area of FOUR HUNDRED EIGHTY FOUR THOUSAND ONE HUNDRED FORTY SIX (484,146) SQUARE METERS, more or less. Points referred to are indicated on the plan and are marked on the ground by Old Points. Bearings True. Date prepared, November 22, 1988 by Supervising Geodetic Engineer I, Reynaldo F. Cruz, approved on December 7, 1988.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

DONE in the City of Manila, this 13th day of May, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and ninety-one.

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO President of the Philippines

By the President:

(Sgd.) OSCAR M. ORBOS Executive Secretary

Source: CDAsia
